error_signature: Activation key has already been used on this instance
title: Activation key already used error in n8n
symptom: When attempting to activate n8n, the user receives an error stating 'Activation key has already been used on this instance'. This prevents the activation of the Community Edition.
applies_when: Attempting to activate with a valid key
not_this_if: Activation key is valid and not previously used
Using a different instance of n8n
root_cause: This error occurs when the activation key has already been registered to the current instance of n8n. This can happen if the instance was previously activated or if the activation status was not cleared properly after a reinstall.
fix_steps: Run the command `n8n license:clear` in your terminal
Attempt to activate again with the key
agent_instruction: Run `n8n license:clear` and restart n8n to reset the activation status.
